examples: For years Microsoft took it, he said, without so much as counterpunch.
Marc-Andre Fleury made 38 saves for Pittsburgh, which allowed the speedy Islanders to counterpunch all night.
Those allowances aside, every so often a stockbroker needs to counterpunch and not be content to be a mere punching bag for a disgruntled customer.
Radio's counterpunch is ... the same old thing, only better.
